steps.title: Target the claim about fusion
steps.content: The student's claim is not just that Catlett made important art. It is that she had a talent for unifying various artistic traditions and styles, so the strongest quotation must show several artistic sources or methods being brought together in one work.

steps.title: Find the combined traditions
steps.content: The quotation about Mother and Child says Catlett used an ancient Indigenous sculpting technique and combined the visual aesthetic of modern Mexican muralists with that of German artist Kathe Kollwitz. That gives multiple traditions and styles in a single sculpture.

steps.title: Separate weaker quotations
steps.content: Choice B describes a collage technique and a mother-and-child pose, but it does not name multiple traditions. Choice C praises the importance of Black Unity without identifying fused styles. Choice D names linoleum-cut prints and their subjects, not a unification of artistic traditions. The answer is A.
